windows.transcript: In case you add food coloring, this is how it will look.
windows.old_description: Blue colour added to the water layer.
windows.embed_text_v2: adding blue food coloring dye to water in a clear shot glass for a floating-oil water candle; yellow oil layer floats above blue tinted water, color demonstration on dark table
windows.summary_v2: Demonstration of adding blue food coloring to the water of a floating-oil water candle, showing the dyed blue water layer forming beneath the yellow oil.

seconds_v2.desc: Small clear shot glass of water on a dark table, with a thin pale-yellow oil layer floating on the water surface; an out-of-focus golden bottle sits to the right.
Same glass, steady shot showing the clear water below and the thin yellow oil film resting on top, dark tabletop reflecting light.
Continued view of the water-and-floating-oil glass; the oil ring is visible at the surface, water still colorless beneath.
Blue food coloring has now been added: the water has turned translucent blue, sinking below the yellow oil layer floating at the top of the glass.
Glass with a clearly layered look now, golden-yellow oil floating above a blue-tinted water column, a small bright spot of light at the base.
Same layered water candle glass, yellow oil band over blue water, demonstrating how dyed water looks beneath the floating oil.
Steady shot of the two-tone glass: yellow oil layer on top, blue colored water below, on the dark surface.
Final hold on the blue-water and yellow-oil layered glass, showing the finished tinted water-candle base before a wick is floated.

windows.embed_text_v2: placing a floating wick onto the oil layer of a water candle in a shot glass, then lighting it; flame burns over yellow oil floating on water, bare fingertip positions the wick
windows.summary_v2: A floating wick is placed onto the oil layer of a water candle and the candle is then lit, the flame burning above the oil.

seconds_v2.desc: Shot glass with layered blue water and a floating yellow oil band on top, sitting on a dark table; a wisp of smoke rises above it.
A bare fingertip lowers a small white floating wick tab onto the oil surface at the center of the glass.
Fingertip still pressing the white wick float onto the yellow oil layer, positioning it in the middle of the glass of blue water.
Hand withdraws, leaving the small white wick float resting on the oil layer at the surface of the blue-water glass.
The white floating wick now sits centered on the oil-and-blue-water glass, ready to be lit; table dark around it.
Steady shot of the prepared water candle: floating wick centered on the yellow oil over blue water in the shot glass.
View shifts to a clear-water version of the glass with the floating wick lit, a tall warm flame burning above the oil layer.
The lit water candle continues to burn with a bright flame over the floating oil wick, warm reflections on the dark table.

windows.summary_v2: A finished floating-wick water candle burns steadily, its flame rising from the oil layer floating on water in a shot glass.

seconds_v2.desc: Lit water candle: a clear shot glass of water with a golden oil layer floating on top and a small flame burning from the floating wick, dark table around it.
The floating wick flame leans and flickers above the oil layer; warm light reflects on the dark surface and a blurred amber object at right.
Flame continues to burn steadily over the yellow oil layer floating on the clear water in the shot glass.
Tall flickering flame rises from the floating wick, the oil band glowing golden where the light passes through it.
Water candle burning, flame angled, with bright reflection cast down through the water to the table.
Steady burning floating wick over the oil-on-water layers in the glass, warm glow on the dark tabletop.
The lit water candle keeps burning; flame upright above the floating wick, oil layer lit amber, slight bloom of light at the glass base.
Close steady hold on the burning water candle, flame over the floating wick and golden oil ring, light pooling under the glass.

seconds_v2.desc: Lit water candle in a clear shot glass: a small flame burns from the floating wick above a golden oil layer on the water, dark tabletop around it.
The floating-wick flame leans and flickers tall above the oil band, warm light reflecting on the dark table and a blurred amber object at right.
Flame still burning over the yellow oil layer on the clear water in the shot glass, bright reflection pooling beneath the glass.
Cut to a swish transition over a wood surface: small black paper cards and a blurred lit-candle thumbnail slide across as the clip changes scene.
A graphic title card animates in over a teal bokeh background, spelling 'CANDLE' in outlined circular letters, tilted against the wood backdrop.

windows.embed_text_v2: finished water candle reveal: clear plastic cup of red-tinted water with a glowing orange decorative ornament submerged, yellow oil layer and white floating wick on top, dark table
windows.summary_v2: A finished red water candle in a clear cup is shown, with a glowing orange ornament submerged under a floating oil layer and white wick as the camera zooms in and out.

seconds_v2.desc: A clear plastic cup of red-tinted water sits on a dark table; a glowing orange ornamental disc rests submerged near the bottom with a thin yellow oil layer floating on top.
Same red water candle in the cup, the submerged orange element catching light; oil band floats at the surface, dark tabletop behind.
Steady shot of the red water-filled cup, the bright orange decorative piece glowing under the surface beneath the floating oil layer.
Camera zooms in close: the yellow oil layer fills the top of the frame, the orange element below glowing amber within the red water.
Tight close-up on the cup's middle, glowing orange ornament suspended in the red liquid with the yellow oil band above it.
Camera pulls back; a white floating wick now visible at the surface, the oil layer and glowing orange disc in the red water below.
Wider view of the finished water candle: white floating wick on top of the yellow oil, orange decorative element glowing in the red water inside the clear cup.
Full cup shown on the dark table, the floating wick centered over the oil layer, glowing orange ornament submerged in the red-tinted water.

tags_v2.action: displaying finished lit rose water candles

seconds_v2.desc: Finished water-candle display on a dark table: a central clear glass jar holds a pink rose submerged in water with a floating wick burning on top, flanked by a lit orange water candle at left and a lit red-berry candle at right.
Same arrangement of three to four lit water candles glowing; the central rose-in-water jar's floating flame upright, warm reflections on the tabletop.
Steady view of the burning rose water candle and surrounding lit candles, the submerged pink rose and stem clearly visible in the clear jar.
The central rose candle keeps burning, floating wick flame above the oil layer; orange gel candle and red-berry votive lit on either side.
Warm glowing display of the lit water candles, rose suspended in the central jar over a bed of pink and orange decorative pieces at the bottom.
Continued hold on the burning rose water candle centerpiece with the other lit candles around it on the dark table.
The rose-in-water candle flame burns tall and steady; the full decorative candle arrangement glows warmly against the pale wall.
Screen splits: the lit rose water candle remains on the left while an inserted cartoon illustration of a Beauty-and-the-Beast rose under a glass bell jar appears on the right for comparison.
